overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through a desaturated industrial desert wasteland in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera travels along a multi-lane highway, briefly ventures onto dirt shoulders, and passes industrial ruins, construction barriers, and sparse desert vegetation while distant city towers loom on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway approach with industrial structures

events.description: black sedan passes by on the right side of the road
approaching and passing under the overhead highway gantry

agents.ego_description: driving forward on the asphalt highway, approaching the overhead gantry structure

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking and moving ahead on the highway

entered.detail: low industrial structure with blue metal roofing and concrete walls
red and white striped construction barriers lining the road edge
large metal highway gantry structure spanning across the road
derelict car parked on the roadside among bushes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desaturated desert highway with industrial buildings visible to the left. The camera drives forward past red and white construction barriers, approaching a large overhead gantry. A black sedan passes by on the right as the scene maintains a clear, bright midday atmosphere with sparse desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder transitioning to dirt terrain

events.description: passing under the overhead gantry structure
vehicle diverges from asphalt onto dirt and gravel shoulder

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive while moving onto the dirt shoulder, passing the blue dome structure

notable_agents.action: yellow vehicle driving on the main road parallel to the camera

entered.detail: large cylindrical structure with translucent blue dome roofing
rusted metal guardrail separating the road from the shoulder

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the highway gantry and immediately transitions onto a dirt shoulder. A distinctive blue dome structure appears on the left while the camera drives alongside a metal guardrail. The ground surface changes from asphalt to gravel and dirt as vehicles continue to pass on the main road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wasteland alongside highway with railroad crossing

events.description: passing the railroad crossing X sign on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving along the dirt terrain parallel to the highway, navigating past desert shrubs

entered.detail: wooden railroad crossing sign with X-shaped crossbuck
large reddish-brown rocky hill formation in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving through open desert terrain alongside the highway, the camera passes a railroad crossing sign on the right. The landscape features sparse desert bushes and distant red rock formations. The industrial complex remains visible in the center distance while the camera maintains a steady path along the dirt shoulder.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wasteland with panoramic industrial views

events.description: camera pans left to reveal expansive desert wasteland and distant hills

agents.ego_description: driving while surveying the open wasteland, turning slightly to take in the panoramic desert views

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle traveling along the highway

entered.detail: massive sloped hill with terraced layers and industrial scaffolding
tall green saguaro cactus standing alone in the desert

segments.scene_description: The camera turns slightly left to reveal an expansive panoramic view of the desert wasteland, showcasing large hill formations and terraced industrial ruins. A tall cactus appears on the left as the scene opens up to display the vastness of the Badlands environment with the highway running parallel on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway return with continuous construction barriers

events.description: returning from dirt terrain to the asphalt highway edge

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the highway, passing construction barriers and approaching the industrial complex

notable_agents.action: oncoming traffic approaching from the distance

entered.detail: extended line of red and white striped barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the asphalt highway edge, driving alongside a continuous line of red and white construction barriers. The industrial complex towers grow larger in the center distance as sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane road. The scene maintains the desaturated, bright desert atmosphere throughout the final stretch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a desaturated desert highway that briefly veers into the rugged wasteland before returning to the industrial road. It begins by passing red and white construction barriers and a large overhead gantry under a bright midday sky, with a black sedan gliding past on the right. As the camera passes under the gantry, it transitions from asphalt onto a gravel shoulder, moving past a blue dome structure and a metal guardrail while the main road continues to the right. The scene then opens into an expansive panoramic view of the Badlands, passing a railroad crossing sign and a tall cactus to reveal distant red rock formations and terraced industrial ruins. Finally, the camera steers back toward the asphalt edge, driving alongside a line of construction barriers as the industrial complex towers grow larger in the distance.
